concepts.domain: National sport governing body — curling federation
concepts.site_goal: Serve as the authoritative operational portal for a national curling federation: publish league standings, athlete rosters, tournament brackets, results archives, officiating rules, and a club locator for member clubs and competitive curlers.
audience: Recreational players looking for a club
concepts.description: A dense, utilitarian institutional site for the National Curling Federation. The aesthetic reads like a federation handbook crossed with a live scoreboard: icy blue (#BCD7E6) panels, granite gray (#3A3F45) headers, and crisp white data tables. Sans-serif typography (a workhorse grotesk) sits at tight leading, with monospaced numerals in standings columns. A persistent results ticker scrolls along the top below the masthead. The homepage stacks a national rankings widget, the next-up tournament bracket teaser, and a 'club of the week' card over a low-contrast topographic ice-rink line motif. Internal pages favor multi-column tables, filter chip rows, and small-cap metadata labels. Iconography is line-only: brooms, stones, hammer indicators, and circular target house diagrams used as section bullets.
concepts.motif: Granite stone cross-section circles, broom-stroke underlines, and concentric target-house rings used as accents around stat blocks; thin hairline rules separate dense table rows.

pages.layout_pattern: Masthead with federation crest left, primary nav row, scrolling results ticker bar, then a three-column dense dashboard: national rankings table (left), upcoming tournament bracket preview (center), latest news + officiating bulletins (right); below, a club-of-the-week spotlight and sponsor strip footer.
sections: Federation masthead with crest and tagline
National rankings table — men's, women's, mixed doubles tabs
Footer with affiliation, contact, and member portal link

pages.layout_pattern: Full-width data table page: filter chip bar at top (season, division, region, gender, discipline), pinned column headers, sortable columns, alternating row shading; sidebar showing legend (W/L, DSC, hammer %), and a small inline trendline sparkline per team.

Roster directory: grid of athlete cards with portrait, club, position (skip/vice/second/lead), national team caps; left-rail filters by team, region, hand dominance, age category; click-through to an athlete profile sub-page with career stats table and competition history timeline.

Horizontal single-elimination bracket diagram spanning a wide scrollable canvas with round-robin pool tables stacked above; each match cell shows team names, end-by-end score grid, hammer indicator, and ice sheet assignment.
sections: Tournament header with dates, venue, draw status

pages.layout_pattern: Two-pane locator: interactive national map (left, ~60%) with dot markers shaded by club size, and a right-side scrollable result list with club name, city, sheets count, and contact; chip filters above for league type, learn-to-curl availability, accessibility, wheelchair curling.
sections: Filter chips (junior program, accessibility, league nights, leagues offered)

pages.layout_pattern: Documentation-style two-pane layout: sticky left-rail table of contents (collapsible chapters), main column with numbered sections, inline diagrams of the house and free-guard zone, callout boxes for rule changes, footnote citations to WCF references.
sections: Handbook version banner with revision date
Diagrams: house, hog line, free guard zone

pages.layout_pattern: Archive page with prominent filter chip rail (season range slider, event type, gender, region, medal-only toggle), then a dense paginated results table grouped by event with expandable rows revealing end-by-end scores; right-side facet panel of years.
sections: Grouped results table with expandable end-by-end detail

pages.layout_pattern: Editorial index: lead story hero with overline category tag, then a two-column list of dated bulletins (selection news, sanctions, results recaps), with a sidebar 'Officiating notices' feed and an athlete-of-the-month box.

message_intent: Convey institutional authority and procedural rigor
Surface live and historical competition data quickly
Make it easy to find a local club and join a league
content_model: Athlete (name, club, position, caps, career_stats, hand)
Club (name, city, region, sheets, programs, contact, geo)
Tournament (event, dates, venue, draws, brackets, officials)
interactions: Sort and filter dense standings tables via chip rows
Pan/zoom the club locator map and click markers for a flyout
Expand match rows to reveal end-by-end scoring grids
Filter results archive by season range slider
Subscribe to officiating notices via email
Download handbook PDF and CSV result exports
asset_needs: National map vector with regional boundaries
concepts.mobile_behavior: Tables collapse into stacked key-value cards with sticky filter chip drawer; bracket scrolls horizontally with a minimap; club locator switches to a list-first view with a map toggle button at top.

concepts.domain: National sport governing body — curling federation
concepts.site_goal: Operate as the central public-facing federation portal emphasizing live competition coverage, member services, and a navigable rules + results knowledge base for the curling community.
audience: Club curlers seeking league standings and schedules
National team athletes and coaching staff
Spectators tracking live events and historical records
concepts.description: A slightly more spacious but still institutionally dense interpretation of the federation site, leaning into a 'broadcast control room' aesthetic. The palette pushes a colder icy blue (#A8C8DC) against near-black granite (#1E2227) and bright white, with a single hot accent of brick red used only for live status pills and hammer indicators. Typography pairs a condensed grotesk for tabular headers with a regular grotesk for body. The motif uses subtle scoreboard halftone gradients and pebbled-ice texture overlays behind hero strips. A persistent left-rail navigation lists every federation function (Compete, Officiate, Develop, Watch, Records). The homepage features a marquee 'on the ice now' module showing sheets currently live across the country, with a sparkline of stones thrown per end.
concepts.motif: Pebbled-ice halftone backgrounds, scoreboard-style segmented digit numerals for scores, hammer icon indicators, and circular house-ring section dividers.

pages.layout_pattern: Left-rail persistent function nav; main column starts with a 'Live on the Ice' marquee grid of in-progress matches (each tile shows team abbreviations, end-by-end scores, hammer indicator); below, a national leaderboard widget, latest results strip, news roll, and a featured club program card; right rail with countdowns to upcoming events.
sections: Left-rail function nav (Compete / Officiate / Develop / Watch / Records)

pages.layout_pattern: Dense paginated league table page with grouped sections per division; top bar of filter chips (season, division, conference, gender, age class); column headers include W, L, DSC, ENDS+, ENDS−, HAM%, DPI; pinned row for the user's followed team if signed in; below the table, head-to-head matrix grid.
sections: Division group headers with collapse toggles

pages.layout_pattern: Tabbed team page (Men, Women, Mixed Doubles, Wheelchair, Juniors); each tab shows a hero team photo, then a roster grid of athlete portrait cards with role badge (Skip, Third, Second, Lead, Alternate); biography sub-pages with career timeline and head-shot, plus an upcoming-schedule strip.
sections: Team hero photo and coaches credit line
Roster card grid with role badges

pages.layout_pattern: Wide horizontal bracket canvas (zoom controls top-right), each match cell expands to reveal a live end-by-end mini scoreboard; below the bracket, a sheet-by-sheet schedule grid showing draw 1 through draw N with times, teams, and ice sheet letters.
sections: Tournament hero strip with venue and draw count
Playoff bracket with expandable match cells

pages.layout_pattern: Map-and-list locator with a search input bar (postal code, city), filter chips for accessibility, learn-to-curl, junior leagues, dedicated ice; map markers cluster at zoom-out; selecting a club opens an inline detail panel with sheets count, league nights, contact, and a 'Visit Club Site' button.
sections: Club result list with badges and distance

pages.layout_pattern: Documentation knowledge base: top search bar, left TOC tree (chapters, subsections), main content column with numbered rules, color-coded rule-change callouts, embedded house diagrams; right-side mini-TOC of current page anchors.
sections: Handbook header with revision date and changelog link
Apply to become an official link

pages.layout_pattern: Results archive with prominent filter chip rail and faceted left sidebar (event type, gender, decade, medal color); main area shows a dense year-grouped list of events, each expandable to reveal final standings, medalists, and links to draw sheets; champions wall at top.
sections: Year-grouped events list with expandable detail

pages.layout_pattern: Newsroom index: top sticky horizontal news ticker bar with auto-scroll headlines, then a primary lead story block, a two-column dated bulletin feed, a sidebar of 'Sanctions & Eligibility Notices', and an officiating bulletin pinned widget.
sections: Press contact and media kit link

message_intent: Project credibility as the sport's national governing authority
Connect prospective curlers with a local club
Document rules and officiating pathways clearly
Preserve and make accessible the historical record of national play
content_model: LiveMatch (teams, end_scores, current_end, hammer, sheet, status)
Athlete (name, position, national_team, club, bio, career_stats)
Tournament (event, dates, venue, draws, officials, broadcast)
Club (name, geo, sheets, programs, accessibility, leagues)
interactions: Hover/click live match tiles to expand end-by-end mini scoreboard
Zoom and cluster the club locator map
Expand year groups in results archive
Use TOC tree and in-page anchors to navigate rules
asset_needs: Athlete and team photographs (placeholder portraits acceptable)
National map vector with member-association regions
concepts.mobile_behavior: Left-rail nav collapses into a slide-in drawer with the function categories; live match tiles stack into a vertical feed; bracket gains horizontal swipe with a sticky round-label header; tables convert to per-row expandable cards; club finder defaults to list view with a floating 'Map' toggle.
